## What this changes
Brief description.

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New theme / skin
- [ ] New data-source adapter
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm test` passes (if `monitor/` changed)
- [ ] JSON schema unchanged, or `schemaVersion` bumped + validation/skin regex updated
- [ ] Screenshot attached (for skin/visual changes)
